description: You are a Data Center Engineer documenting a new server rack installation (ID: RK-NYC-042) at the NYC-DC1 facility. Using the hardware manifest at '~/Desktop/rack_manifest.txt', create a formal Rack Elevation Diagram in draw.io. The diagram must feature a 42U rack cabinet containing all 14 items from the manifest at their exact U-positions. Label each active device with its hostname and color-code the equipment: Network (Blue), Compute/Servers (Green), Database (Orange), Power/UPS (Red), and Passive (Gray). Include a legend for the color-coding and a title with the Rack ID 'RK-NYC-042' and location 'NYC-DC1'. Save the editable diagram to '~/Desktop/rack_elevation.drawio' and export a PNG image to '~/Desktop/rack_elevation.png'.
